title: Air Dry Clay Christmas Kit, 36 Colors DIY Modelling Clay Craft Set with Accessories, Christmas Stocking Stuffers for Kids, Xmas Gift for Girls Boys
features: ALL-IN-ONE CHRISTMAS CLAY KIT: Everything you need in one box! Includes 36 vibrant colors of air dry clay, a 5 pcs sculpting tool, acrylic sheet, glue, tweezers, toothpicks, needles, and a plastic light string to make your creations glow
CHRISTMAS ACCESSORIES: Elevate your crafts with decorations, make snowmen, christmas trees and many other fun clay models with our clay, giving you endless creative possibilities

AIR DRY CLAY CRAFT KIT: This Christmas theme brings a galaxy of creative possibilities for a fun sensory experience. Boost your little one's creativity, help them develop fine motor skills, and enhance hand-eye coordination

EASY TO USE: The clay is soft, non-sticky, and easy to shape for little hands. It air-dries naturally without the need for an oven. The included step-by-step instruction manual guides beginners and kids through fun projects, building confidence and creativity

THE PERFECT HOLIDAY ACTIVITY: An ideal craft project for kids, families, and beginners. Great for Christmas parties, classroom activities, or developing fine motor skills. Makes a fantastic Christmas gift or stocking stuffer
description: Product description Air Dry Clay Safety Warning CHOKING HAZARD -- Small parts. Not for children under 3 yrs.
